name: elnora-merit-aktiva
description: Merit Aktiva accounting for Claude Code — single-plugin marketplace.

plugins.name: merit-aktiva-workspace
plugins.description: Merit Aktiva accounting + Merit Palk payroll for Claude Code — full API coverage via the elnora-merit CLI, plus how-to skills for the correct procedure (accounting: sales/purchase invoices, payments/bank, VAT/KMD, reports, reverse charge; payroll: employees, salaries/absences, reports, settings), agents, and slash commands.
